name: node-deep-is
title: node-deep-is
summary: node's assert.deepEqual algorithm except for NaN being equal to NaN
description:
node's assert.deepEqual algorithm except for NaN being equal to NaN
Node's `assert.deepEqual() algorithm` as a standalone module. Exactly like
deep-equal except for the fact that `deepEqual(NaN, NaN) === true`.
.
This module is around 5 times faster than wrapping `assert.deepEqual()` in a
`try/catch`.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-deep-is because node's assert.deepEqual algorithm except for NaN being equal to NaN.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-deep-is as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-deep-is with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-deep-is --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
